TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Bob Allen nalecuhan i Amilika, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Bob Allen i 1968 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 6 ku uwac atu silsil 71, namapili' tu nu San Francisco Warriors putiput. 7 bulad 17 demiad, 1946 a mihca, Bob Allen, miunduay.
S.PHON: bob ar~ɾr~ɾən nar~ɾəʦuħan i amir~ɾika, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. bob ar~ɾr~ɾən i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu san franʦisʦo warriors putiput. * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, bob ar~ɾr~ɾən, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Bob Allen nalecuhan i Amilika, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Bob Allen i 1968 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 6 ku uwac atu silsil 71, namapili' tu nu San Francisco Warriors putiput. 7 bulad 17 demiad, 1946 a mihca, Bob Allen, miunduay.
S.PHON: bob ar~ɾr~ɾən nar~ɾəʦuħan i amir~ɾika, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. bob ar~ɾr~ɾən i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu san franʦisʦo warriors putiput. * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, bob ar~ɾr~ɾən, miunduaj.
